name: Pecos Steaks on Olive Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim steaks well.
2. Mix 1 tablespoon garlic with chile flakes and black pepper on the back of a spoon, making a paste.
3. Rub the mixture onto both sides of the steaks.
4. Cut 4 thick (1") slices from the bread on a sharp diagonal.
5. Melt butter in a pan and mix in chopped olives, cilantro, and remaining garlic.
6. Grill or broil the bread until both sides are toasted. If broiling, lower the broiler rack slightly for easier toasting.
7. Spoon the olive butter mixture onto the toast.
8. Place the toast on plates and top with the steaks.
Cooking time: 7-10 minutes
Total preparation time: 15 minutes
